oai_dc:dc.dc:title: Sustainable success: Mastering the solo food animal veterinary practice
oai_dc:dc.dc:creator: Kull, Jody
oai_dc:dc.dc:description: Solo veterinary practice in rural areas can align with personal passions and meet critical needs in the community. With a few smart practice strategies, it can not only be successful and sus­tainable, but also enjoyable and profitable. Dr. Jody Kull shares her experience of owning and operating Valley Mobile Veteri­nary Service, a successful food animal veterinary practice for over 15 years in Pennsylvania.
oai_dc:dc.dc:source: American Association of Bovine Practitioners Conference Proceedings; Vol. 58 No. 2 (2025): 2025 AABP Annual Conference Proceedings; 155
oai_dc:dc.dc:rights: Copyright (c) 2026 American Association of Bovine Practitioners
